reset_biology_synthesis.recommendation: Reset Biology suggests asking the practitioner to consider that 'GLP-1' is a class — semaglutide, tirzepatide, retatrutide, and the newer GLP-1/glucagon dual agonists (mazdutide, survodutide) — with very different receptor profiles, and that the operative dose-form question is microdose-and-split rather than peak-titrate-and-cycle. Hunter (0TyW-wlJMxo 00:37:14.160): "throw in a two to one ratio of Tirzepatide Retatrutide. So maybe if you put in 1 mg of Tirzepatide once a week alongside Retatrutide, you will definitely have more appetite suppression"; Trevor (igkOl7DpTs0 00:33:35.440): "Daily micro doing of redatruide. Listen to the operative word. Daily micro doing." We'd ask the prescribing physician to weigh receptor profile (single vs dual vs triple agonist), gut-readiness (Hunter's SIBO/Candida/high-fat caveats), and the cycling-vs-forever decision before settling protocol.
reset_biology_synthesis.caveats:
- Gut prerequisite: Hunter email threadId 195fdb93188e97f0 (2025-04-03): "GLP-1 peptides work mainly by slowing down gastric emptying" and "This exact mechanism becomes a huge problem when combined with three factors: 1. High-fat diets 2. Candida overgrowth 3. Small intestinal bacterial overgrowth (SIBO)" — also "Treat SIBO or Candida FIRST."
- Pregnancy / breastfeeding: Trevor (6eZTiUoEpcM 00:00:30.560): "this is read a true tide and pregnancy and breastfeeding and why that is easily the biggest gamble with your child's life."
- Hypoglycemia framing: Hunter email threadId 196177296bf4b2dd (2025-04-08): "GLP-1 peptides are incredibly safe when it comes to blood sugar management" and "the chance of experiencing dangerously low blood sugar when using these peptides — especially if you're not diabetic — is extremely low."
- NAION / blindness signal: Hunter email threadId 19ab8288a9f895cd (2025-11-24): "there were 35 cases out of nearly 80,000 people using these drugs over two years. Hardly an epidemic" and "every single one of these large studies is observational, retrospective, and overwhelmingly involves patients with type 2 diabetes, hypertension, obesity, and other vascular comorbidities."
- Don't combine triple-agonist with dual-agonist: Trevor (D5766FmqUzk 00:10:47.839): "combining GLP1 and GIP. And your body sees it as a two-pronged attack." Trevor (PEbu7E8QB_Y 00:01:23.520): "Please don't take this. This stuff is trash. It's an appetite suppressant with a fancy label. That's all it is with great marketing" — referring to combining retatrutide and tirzepatide.
- Titrate slowly: Hunter email threadId 19d45fc334be87a7 (2026-03-31): "People who escalate every 4 weeks instead of every 2 weeks are far more compliant and much better able to stay on the compound long term. Don't rush the titration."
- Dose-splitting trick (Hunter): Hunter email threadId 19d45fc334be87a7 (2026-03-31): "Always prefer to split weekly total across 2-3 injections rather than all at once" — "Example: 6 mg/wk → 2 mg Mon + 2 mg Wed + 2 mg Fri" and "Hunter does this with retatrutide too."
- Highest-dose trap: Taylor (V5WgMemX0rc 00:18:13.360): "you don't want to be on the highest dose you want a micro do with these glp ones and use this as a tool for a lifestyle change this is not a magic pill."
reset_biology_synthesis.cross_expert_consensus: Mechanism — Hunter email threadId 195fdb93188e97f0 (2025-04-03): "GLP-1 peptides work mainly by slowing down gastric emptying — meaning your food stays in your stomach longer, making you feel fuller faster and longer"; Trevor (igkOl7DpTs0 00:06:23.199): "GLP-1 binds to GLP-1 receptors on pancreatic beta cells, triggering this cascade that involves a denal cycl activation, cyclic AM activation, and ultimately insulin secretion, but only when glucose is present. Taylor's specific weekly anchor for women — Taylor (S4hfIPWRKZ0 00:06:03.360): "I typically take 250 microgram once a week and I do an 8we on 8 we off rotation" (semaglutide) and (S4hfIPWRKZ0 00:10:26.680): "use trapti is that I do 2.5 milligrams once a week" (tirzepatide) and (S4hfIPWRKZ0 00:15:53.269): "fluctuate between 1.5 to 2 milligrams I do this I do this um once a week" (retatrutide).
